svg.text: DOCKER COMPOSE — runs on your laptop / server
TOOL LAYER — each tool runs in an isolated Docker container
Any tool with a normalizer adapter · ScubaGear · Terrascan · Grype · AWS Security Hub · Defender for Cloud · ...
Add any tool: register in tools.yaml + write ~50-line normalizer · no core changes required
App GW · Postgres · Redis · Entra ID
